name: Grilled Chicken Dijon Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 boned and skinned chicken breast halves, fat removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together mustard, crushed tarragon leaves, and cracked black pepper; stir in vinegar and water.
2. Gradually add olive oil, beating until well blended.
3. Pour 1/3 cup of the dressing mixture over chicken.
4. Marinate mushrooms and broccoli in the remaining dressing.
5. Drain chicken, reserving marinade. Grill chicken over medium coals, 4 minutes on each side or to desired doneness, brushing with reserved marinade mixture.
6. Cut chicken into 8 strips.
7. Combine mushrooms, broccoli, and marinade (see note) with torn greens and cheese in a serving bowl; toss lightly.
8. Arrange lettuce mixture on a large platter; top with chicken and onion rings.
